enter_url: Enter the property listing URL to generate your report.

wizard_url_validation_failed: We could not validate this link right now. Please try again.
wizard_url_not_property: This link does not appear to be a public residential property listing. Please use a direct property listing link.
wizard_url_not_buying_property: This link does not appear to be a property for sale. Please use a buying listing link.
wizard_url_not_renting_property: This link does not appear to be a rental property. Please use a renting listing link.

cookie_banner_title: We use cookies to keep the website working properly.
cookie_banner_intro: We use essential cookies for core functionality and optional cookies to understand website usage. Read our
cookie_banner_customize_title: Choose which optional cookies you want to allow
cookie_banner_customize_text: Necessary cookies stay active. You can decide separately for statistics, marketing, and saved preferences.
cookie_settings_necessary_summary: Always active for security, checkout flow, and consent storage.
cookie_settings_necessary_details: These cookies are required for the website to function correctly, keep secure sessions active, remember your consent choice, and support essential report and payment flows.
cookie_settings_statistics_summary: Helps us understand website usage and improve the experience.
cookie_settings_statistics_details: Statistics cookies measure page views, browsing paths, and general engagement so we can improve content, navigation, and performance over time.
cookie_settings_marketing_summary: Used for campaign measurement and advertising performance.
cookie_settings_marketing_details: Marketing cookies allow us to measure campaigns, understand which channels drive conversions, and improve advertising efficiency across platforms such as Google.
cookie_settings_preferences_summary: Remembers display and experience choices for future visits.
cookie_settings_preferences_details: Preference cookies help keep experience settings consistent between visits, such as remembered choices and interface behavior that are not strictly required for the site to work.
payment_checkout_note: You will be redirected to Stripe. Report generation starts only after the payment is confirmed.
payment_unavailable: We couldn't open the payment page right now. Please try again.
payment_retry_unavailable: This report is not waiting for a payment.
payment_status_sync_error: We couldn't refresh the payment status right now. Please reload the page.
report_delivery_note: You will receive your report within 24 hours.
status_awaiting_payment: Complete the Stripe payment to start generating your report.
status_payment_processing: Payment confirmed. Your report is now being prepared.
status_payment_cancelled: Payment was cancelled. You can restart checkout below.
status_payment_failed: Payment failed or the checkout session expired. You can try again below.
status_to_be_sent: Your report is ready and will be sent shortly.
status_sent: Your report has been sent to your email.
status_error: There was an error generating your report. Our team has been notified.
status_not_accessible: The URL could not be accessed. Please try again.
auto_update_note: This page updates automatically every few seconds.
pdf_footer: This report was generated by Get Your Consultant. The information is for guidance purposes only.

email_subject_rental_business: Your Rental (Business) Property Report is Ready

sidebar_how_step_1: Select your report type and property category
sidebar_how_step_2: Paste the property listing URL for AI analysis
sidebar_how_step_3: Receive a comprehensive PDF report via email
sidebar_secure_desc: Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties. Reports are delivered directly to your inbox.
sidebar_fast_desc: Most reports are generated within minutes and sent straight to your email.
payment_retry_note: If the Stripe page was closed, cancelled, or expired, you can start a new checkout from here.
landing_meta_title: Check a property before you buy/rent
landing_hero_title_1: Check a property before you buy/rent.
landing_hero_desc: Find out whether the price is fair, what risks it hides, and whether it is worth the investment.
landing_types_desc: Renting or buying, residential or commercial.
landing_how_desc: Three steps to a full report.
landing_step1_desc: Copy the property listing link from any major platform and paste it into the form.
landing_step2_desc: We send the finished report directly to your inbox. No spam, no sharing.
landing_step3_desc: The listing is analyzed across 12 dimensions and delivered as a detailed, scored PDF.
landing_features_desc: Each report covers pricing, risk, location quality, and investment potential in concrete detail.
landing_feat1_desc: The asking price compared against local market data with a fair-value estimate.
landing_feat2_desc: Safety, noise, amenities, foot traffic, and neighborhood trends mapped out.
landing_feat3_desc: Landlord, legal, zoning, and construction risks flagged before you commit.
landing_feat4_desc: Most reports are generated and sent within minutes of submission.
landing_feat5_desc: A single composite score so you can compare multiple properties directly.
landing_feat6_desc: Clean, structured report you can save locally, print, or forward.
landing_hero_form_desc: Choose the report type, add the property link, and start the analysis without extra steps.
landing_hero_form_note: Choose the report type, paste the link, and start the analysis right away without extra steps.
landing_example_title: See what the report looks like
landing_example_desc: You get a clear decision document, not a vague summary or generic marketing text.
landing_example_placeholder: Placeholder for report page one. We can replace this with a real mockup or screenshot next.
landing_problem_title: Why do you need this report?
landing_problem_item_1: You do not know if the price is fair
landing_problem_item_2: You cannot see the hidden risks
landing_problem_item_3: You could lose tens of thousands of euros
landing_step1_desc: Add the URL of the listing you want to verify.
landing_step2_desc: The model reviews market data, area quality, positioning, and risk.
landing_step3_desc: The result is delivered quickly in a format that is easy to scan and act on.
landing_pricing_desc: Two residential options, simple to compare before you decide.
landing_disclaimer_desc: The report is informational and does not represent an official valuation.
landing_cta_title: Do not make a decision without checking first.
landing_cta_desc: Paste the property link and quickly see whether it is worth buying, negotiating, or avoiding.
landing_footer_desc: Clear residential buying and rental analysis, delivered fast in a structured format.
landing_footer_legal_note: GetYourConsultant™ trademark filed with Euipo (European Union Intellectual Property Office).
landing_rental_detail_1: Fair rent estimate and positioning against market listings
landing_rental_detail_2: Area quality checks: safety, noise, amenities and access
landing_rental_detail_3: Red-flag scan before signing the rental contract
landing_buying_detail_1: Price-to-value benchmark using local market context
landing_buying_detail_2: Investment potential and long-term area trend scoring
landing_buying_detail_3: Full risk breakdown for legal, zoning and hidden costs
landing_compare_desc: Both can help, but they solve different needs. Use our report when you need speed, structure and consistent comparisons across multiple listings.
landing_compare_point_1_human: Often days to schedule and deliver.
landing_compare_point_1_report: Generated in minutes and sent directly by email.
landing_compare_point_2_human: Quoted case-by-case, usually with higher total costs.
landing_compare_point_2_report: Fixed transparent pricing per report, VAT included.
landing_compare_point_3_human: Depends on each consultant's style and template.
landing_compare_point_4_human: Hard to compare many properties quickly.
landing_compare_point_4_report: Uniform scoring helps compare listings side by side.
landing_pricing_desc: Two residential options, simple to compare before you decide.
landing_pricing_rental_feature_1: Rental price positioning and fair-rent estimate
landing_pricing_rental_feature_4: Structured PDF report sent by email
landing_pricing_buying_feature_1: Buying price benchmark and value estimate
landing_pricing_buying_feature_3: Risk review: legal, zoning, hidden costs
landing_pricing_buying_feature_4: Comprehensive PDF report with final score
landing_contact_desc: If you are an agency, portfolio buyer, or partner, contact us and we can tailor a reporting workflow for your team.
contact_page_title: Do you have questions? We’re here to help you.
contact_page_desc: Send us a question, a support request, or a collaboration proposal, and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_subject_placeholder: What would you like to discuss?
contact_form_message_placeholder: Tell us what you need, what property flow (information) you are interested in, or how we can help.
contact_form_success: Your message was sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.
contact_form_required_note: We usually reply within 1-2 business days.
contact_sidebar_response_desc: Use this form for questions, support, feedback, or collaboration inquiries. Every message is reviewed manually.
contact_validation_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
contact_validation_recaptcha_failed: We could not verify this submission. Please try again.
landing_social_proof_note: Trusted by buyers and renters who want a faster, clearer decision.
landing_hero_visual_title: Space for the main product visual
landing_hero_visual_desc: This area is reserved for the image that instantly explains what the platform does: checks price, risk, and the final property verdict.
landing_hero_visual_panel_2_body: The model quickly surfaces hidden costs, weak positioning, and purchase risks before you move forward.
landing_hero_visual_chip_1: Clear PDF pages that are easy to scan
landing_hero_visual_chip_2: Market and area analysis in one place
landing_why_title: Why checking first changes the decision
landing_why_desc: A clear report helps you see quickly whether the property is worth pursuing.
landing_why_item_1_desc: See quickly whether the asking price is above real market value.
landing_why_item_2_desc: Get clear points you can use in a stronger negotiation.
landing_why_item_3_desc: Spot warning signals before you invest more time or money.
landing_why_item_4_desc: Compare listings faster and focus only on the ones worth your time.
landing_example_visual_title: Space for the first page visual
landing_example_visual_desc: Replace this placeholder with the final screenshot or polished mockup of the report's first PDF page.
landing_how_desc: Three simple visual steps from property URL to a confident final verdict.
landing_process_item_1_desc: Paste the listing URL from the platform where you found the property and start the verification flow.
landing_process_item_2_desc: We process the relevant pricing, risk, area, and investment context in a clear structured format.
landing_process_item_3_desc: You receive the full report with a final score and a clear recommendation for a safer decision.
landing_reviews_title: Over 2500 generated reports for customers who want clarity before they commit
landing_reviews_desc: Real feedback from people who wanted more clarity before taking the next step.
landing_reviews_stat_reports_body: Reports generated for buyers and renters who wanted a decision based on data rather than gut feeling.
landing_reviews_stat_rating_body: Customers value the clarity of the verdict, the fast turnaround, and the help the report gives them in negotiation.
landing_reviews_quote_1: The report helped me see immediately where the listing was overpriced, and I negotiated with much more confidence.
landing_reviews_quote_2: I liked that I got a clear verdict and that the information was structured around exactly what I needed to verify.
landing_reviews_quote_3: I compared three properties in the same format, and it became much easier to decide which one deserved a closer look.
landing_pricing_buying_visual_label: Suggested image: a bright modern apartment, suitable for the buying report card.
landing_pricing_rental_visual_label: Suggested image: a compact urban apartment, suitable for the rental report card.
landing_cta_support_note: Better to verify first than discover the problems later. Start the analysis in a few seconds.
landing_cta_visual_desc: Ideal for a transparent-background asset that blends naturally into the section and sits on the right side.
landing_cta_visual_chip_1_value: A clear report ready in minutes
landing_cta_visual_chip_2_value: Use a transparent-background apartment-block image here so it feels naturally embedded into the section.
